title: warm japanese vanilla custard hot pot
description: winey, crisp, comforting japanese dish featuring vanilla custard, caramelized goodness in a warm hot pot vessel. a must-try for lacto-vegetarians

ingredients.name: vanilla beans
ingredients.notes: fresh or high-quality dried beans work best

instructions: in a small bowl, whisk together eggs, granulated sugar, and cornstarch until light and fluffy
heat milk in a saucepan over medium heat until hot but not boiling
temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring the hot milk into the eggs, whisking constantly
return the saucepan to medium heat and cook the custard, stirring constantly, until it thickens and coats the back of a spoon
remove the custard from heat and stir in vanilla extract
in a separate pan, caramelize the sugar over medium heat until it forms a deep amber color
remove the sugar from heat and carefully pour it into the hot pot vessel
pour the vanilla custard into the sugar-lined hot pot vessel and smooth the top
cover the hot pot vessel with a lid and cook over low heat until the custard is set and the flavors have melded together
